data.reasoningText:
The solution build is not cascading into the individual projects. The metaproj file might not be resolving them properly. The solution file uses the old C# GUID `{FAE04EC0-301F-11D3-BF4B-00C04F79EFBC}` which should be fine. But .NET 10 SDK may handle solution files differently. Let me try with the `-tl:off` flag or investigate the metaproj.

Actually, looking at the solution file again, I notice there are no `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` entries in the `Global` section. The solution only has `SolutionConfigurationPlatforms` but doesn't map them to project configurations. MSBuild needs `ProjectConfigurationPlatforms` to know which projects to build in which configuration.


I should add those missing mappings or try a different build approach.
